50% off minis when you buy a full-size moisturizer or cleanser!

Let’s go halfsies

Half off, as in 50%. That’s the discount you get on minis when you buy a full-size moisturizers or cleanser. Stock up while you can, and don’t forget to add your mini to your cart!

Offer valid only valid on Lala Retro Cream 50 ml, Lala Retro Refill, Protini Cream 50 ml, Protini Cream 100 ml, Protini Cream Refill, Virgin Marula Oil 30 ml, Mello Marula 150 ml, Beste No.9 Cleanser 150 ml, Bora Barrier 50 ml, Bora Barrier Refill. Must add full-sizes, refills, and qualifying minis to cart to receive offer. 50% off valid only on Lala Cream 15 ml, Protini Cream 15 ml. Bora Barrier 15 ml, Virgin Marula Oil 15 ml, Mello Marula 60 ml, Bester No. 9 Cleanser 60 ml. Limited quantities available while supplies. Valid on qualifying orders placed from 3/16/2026 at 3:00 a.m. ET through 3/24/2026 at 2:59 a.m. ET. Excludes gift cards.
